cases.title: TS-13: Open Draft session transitions to Active with Pending attendance and QR scheduler
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor with ClassAssignment for HESD-01 / SWE-101
Draft session exists with valid room GPS (10.762622, 106.660172) and scheduledStart aligned to workshop timetable
Roster has N enrolled students for the class-subject pair
steps: POST /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/open with Instructor session cookie
Assert HTTP status 200 and response body status is Active with openedAt set
GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/attendance and assert summary.enrolled equals N and summary.pending equals N
GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/qr/current and assert HTTP 200 with valid qrPayload, secondsRemaining ≤ 30, and attendanceWindowClosesAt equals scheduledStart + 10 minutes
cases.expected: Session becomes Active per AC-05a; attendance window starts; QR issuance begins with window close timestamp; one Pending record per enrolled student

cases.title: SessionOpenSeed creates Pending attendance rows equal to enrollment count on open
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL test database is running
Draft session row with valid GPS exists for HESD-01 / SWE-101
Enrollment table has exactly N active students for the session class-subject
SessionService.open wired to AttendanceService.initializeForSession
steps: Count enrollments for session classId and subjectId
Invoke SessionService.open(sessionId) under owning Instructor context
Query attendance_records table filtered by sessionId
Verify row count equals N and every row has status Pending with checked_in_at NULL
cases.expected: SessionOpenSeed integration per testing-plan §5: Pending rows equal enrollment count; no Present or Absent rows created on open

cases.title: POST /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/open returns 200 with Active Session DTO
preconditions: Instructor session cookie is set
Draft sessionId with valid GPS owned by instructor is known
steps: Send POST /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/open with Instructor session
Assert HTTP status 200
Assert response body contains id, status Active, openedAt timestamp, and scheduledStart
Assert response body status is not Draft or Closed
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with updated Session DTO per API design §5.4; status Active confirms check-in window and QR scheduler started

cases.title: TS-14: Enrolled student check-in within 10-minute attendance window succeeds
preconditions: Active session with openedAt set and scheduledStart in the past
Test clock fixed so openedAt ≤ now ≤ scheduledStart + 10 minutes per SM-01 §2.4
Authenticated enrolled Student with valid unexpired QR token from GET /api/v1/sessions/:id/qr/current
Student coordinates within session gpsRadiusMeters
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with tokenId, latitude 10.762700, longitude 106.660200 using Student session
Assert HTTP status 200 and outcome Success
GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/attendance and locate student record
Assert attendance status is Present with checkedInAt populated
cases.expected: Check-in allowed when session Active and openedAt ≤ now ≤ min(closedAt, scheduledStart + 10 min) per SM-01 §2.4, AC-05b, and BR-01

cases.title: TS-15: Auto-close after scheduledStart + 10 minutes sets Closed and Pending to Absent
preconditions: Active session with M students still in Pending status
Instructor has not manually closed the session
Test clock injectable; advance to scheduledStart + 10 minutes + 1 second
AutoCloseScheduler job enabled in test environment
steps: Trigger AutoCloseScheduler tick or wait for scheduler run at advanced clock time
GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId and assert status Closed with closedAt set
GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/attendance and assert summary.pending is 0 and summary.absent equals M
Query attendance_records for sessionId and verify all previously Pending rows are Absent
cases.expected: Session auto-transitions to Closed per AC-05c and BR-01; all Pending records become Absent without instructor action

cases.title: TS-16: Check-in after session Closed returns SessionNotActive and attendance stays Absent
preconditions: Closed session with student attendance status Absent (was Pending at close)
Authenticated enrolled Student session available
Valid or expired QR token for the closed session
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with tokenId and valid coordinates using Student session
Assert HTTP status 403
Assert response outcome SessionNotActive with errorCode SessionNotActive
GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/attendance for the student and assert status remains Absent
cases.expected: Late check-in rejected per AC-05d; outcome SessionNotActive; Absent status unchanged unless instructor manually overrides per BR-10

cases.title: SessionService.open transitions Draft to Active with openedAt and side effects
preconditions: Draft session row exists in PostgreSQL with valid room_latitude and room_longitude
SessionService.open invoked under owning Instructor context
steps: Record beforeState Draft from sessions table
Invoke SessionService.open(sessionId)
Query sessions table and read status and opened_at columns
Verify QrService scheduler started (qr_tokens row issued within test window)
Verify attendance_records count matches enrollment count with status Pending
cases.expected: beforeState Draft, afterState Active; openedAt set; attendance bootstrap and QR scheduler side effects per state machine SM-01 §6.1

cases.title: SessionCloseFinalize bulk updates Pending attendance to Absent in Postgres transaction
preconditions: Active session with K Pending and P Present attendance records in PostgreSQL
SessionService.close wired to AttendanceService.finalizeOnClose
steps: Invoke SessionService.close(sessionId) under owning Instructor context
Query sessions table and assert status Closed with closed_at set
Query attendance_records for sessionId where status was Pending before close
Assert all K previously Pending rows are now Absent
Assert P Present rows remain Present unchanged
cases.expected: SessionCloseFinalize per testing-plan §5: Pending → Absent bulk update; Present and Excused records preserved; QR scheduler stopped

cases.title: AutoCloseScheduler transitions Active session to Closed at scheduledStart + 10 min
preconditions: Active session row with scheduled_start in the past and status Active
TestClock fixed at scheduledStart + 10 minutes
AutoCloseScheduler queries Active sessions past window
steps: Record beforeState Active from sessions table
Invoke AutoCloseScheduler.run() or equivalent tick
Query sessions table for sessionId
Invoke AttendanceService query and count Absent vs Pending
cases.expected: beforeState Active, afterState Closed; closedAt set; same finalize side effects as manual close per AC-05c

cases.title: POST /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/close returns 200 with Closed Session DTO
preconditions: Instructor session cookie is set
Active sessionId owned by instructor with at least one Pending attendance record
steps: Send POST /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/close with Instructor session
Assert HTTP status 200
Assert response body contains status Closed and closedAt timestamp
GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/qr/current and assert no valid token (session not Active)
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with updated Session DTO per API design §5.5; status Closed; QR scheduler stopped; roster frozen after close

cases.title: Student denied POST /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/open with 403 Forbidden
preconditions: Authenticated Student session is available
Draft session with valid GPS exists
Student role lacks session:write permission per roles matrix §2.2
steps: POST /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/open using Student session cookie
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden
Assert response errorCode Forbidden with localized permission-denied message
GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId and assert status remains Draft
cases.expected: Student cannot open sessions per roles-permissions §2.3; HTTP 403; session lifecycle unchanged

cases.title: Student denied POST /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/close with 403 Forbidden
preconditions: Authenticated Student session is available
Active sessionId exists
Student role lacks session:write permission
steps: POST /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/close using Student session cookie
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden and errorCode Forbidden
GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId and assert status remains Active
cases.expected: Student cannot close sessions; HTTP 403; session remains Active with attendance window open

cases.title: TrainingOfficeAdmin denied POST /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/open without session:write
preconditions: Authenticated TrainingOfficeAdmin session is available
Draft session with valid GPS exists
Admin has session:read institution-wide but no default session:write per MVP policy
steps: POST /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/open using TrainingOfficeAdmin session cookie
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden and errorCode Forbidden
GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId and assert status remains Draft
cases.expected: Admin cannot open instructor sessions in MVP default policy; access denied with 403 Forbidden

cases.title: POST /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/open on Active session returns 409 InvalidSessionState
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor owns an Active session
Instructor session cookie is set
steps: POST /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/open with Instructor session
Assert HTTP status 409
Assert response errorCode InvalidSessionState
GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId and assert status remains Active
cases.expected: Illegal Draft→Active transition blocked when already Active per API design §5.4; no duplicate open side effects

cases.title: Check-in after attendance window end returns 403 SessionNotActive while session still Active
preconditions: Active session with scheduledStart in the past
Test clock fixed at scheduledStart + 10 minutes + 30 seconds before auto-close scheduler runs
Authenticated enrolled Student with valid QR token
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with valid tokenId and in-radius coordinates using Student session
Assert HTTP status 403
Assert response outcome SessionNotActive with errorCode SessionNotActive and Vietnamese message
GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/attendance for student and assert status remains Pending or becomes Absent after subsequent close
cases.expected: Check-in rejected when now > scheduledStart + 10 min per SM-01 §2.4 window end and BR-01; outcome SessionNotActive before or after close finalize

cases.title: SessionService.close rejects non-Active session with InvalidSessionState
preconditions: Draft or Closed session row exists in PostgreSQL
SessionService.close invoked under Instructor context
steps: Invoke SessionService.close(sessionId) for Draft session
Capture domain exception with errorCode InvalidSessionState
Query sessions table and confirm status unchanged
Repeat for Closed session and assert same rejection
cases.expected: Close transition allowed only from Active per SM-01; Illegal transition throws InvalidSessionState; no attendance finalize

cases.title: Flow A step 2: Instructor opens Draft session to start live check-in
preconditions: Roster seeded for HESD-01 / SWE-101 via prior CSV import (Flow A step 1)
Draft session with valid GPS created
Authenticated Instructor with assignment to HESD-01 / SWE-101
steps: POST /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/open with Instructor session
Assert session status Active and openedAt set
GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/qr/current and capture token for student check-in (Flow A step 3)
GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/attendance and verify Pending count matches enrolled roster
cases.expected: Session opened as Flow A step 2 per testing-plan §6; QR and attendance bootstrap ready for student check-in (step 4) and eventual close (step 6)

cases.title: Instructor opens live session from session detail UI and sees Active status
preconditions: Instructor is logged in to instructor SPA
Draft session with valid GPS exists for assigned class HESD-01
Instructor navigates to session detail page for the Draft session
steps: Verify Mở buổi học (open session) action is enabled when GPS is configured
Click Mở buổi học and confirm dialog *Xác nhận mở buổi học?*
Wait for status badge update and button loading to complete
Verify session status badge shows Đang diễn ra (Active) and openedAt timestamp is visible
Verify tab switches to Theo dõi (monitor) per ui-states §7.5
Verify navigation links to QR display and live monitor are available
cases.expected: Session opened via UI per AC-05a; Active status displayed; monitor tab active; instructor can proceed to QR projection and monitoring

cases.title: Instructor live monitor shows enrolled count and Present vs Pending progress during Active session
preconditions: Instructor is logged in with Active session in progress
At least one student has checked in Present; others remain Pending
Instructor navigates to /sessions/:sessionId and selects Theo dõi (monitor) tab per ui-states §7.3 and WF-03 §4.5
steps: Verify summary panel shows summary.present and summary.enrolled matching GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/attendance
Verify roster table lists students with status badges Present and Chờ (Pending)
Wait up to 5 seconds for poll refresh after a new check-in per ui-states §7.3
Verify present count increments without manual page reload
cases.expected: Live monitor reflects AC-05 monitoring requirement per WF-03 §4.5; attendance counts update every 5 s during Active window

cases.title: Instructor manually closes Active session from session detail UI
preconditions: Instructor is logged in and viewing Active session detail or monitor page
Session has Pending students not yet checked in
steps: Click Đóng buổi học (close session) action
Confirm close in dialog prompt (*Kết thúc điểm danh?*)
Wait for status badge update and button loading to complete
Verify session status badge shows Đã kết thúc (Closed)
Verify QR display and open-session actions are unavailable
Verify monitor tab shows banner *Buổi học đã kết thúc* and polling stops per ui-states §7.3
Verify monitor shows remaining Pending students marked Vắng (Absent)
cases.expected: Manual close via UI per AC-05; session Closed; Pending finalized to Absent; check-in window closed and roster frozen

cases.title: Parallel manual close and auto-close yield single Closed transition without duplicate finalize
preconditions: Active session past scheduledStart + 10 minutes on TestClock
AutoCloseScheduler and SessionService.close both eligible to run
Optimistic lock on Session.version enabled per 06-main-workflows.md §9
steps: Launch parallel SessionService.close(sessionId) and AutoCloseScheduler tick for same sessionId
Await both operations to settle
Query sessions table once and assert status Closed with single closed_at value
Count attendance_records with status Absent for previously Pending students
Assert no duplicate SessionClosed events or double Absent updates
cases.expected: First close wins per optimistic lock; exactly one Closed transition; Pending→Absent applied once; no data corruption

cases.title: GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/qr/current returns attendanceWindowClosesAt during Active session
preconditions: Instructor session cookie is set
Active sessionId with scheduledStart known and QR scheduler running
steps: GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/qr/current with Instructor session
Assert HTTP status 200 with qrPayload, tokenId, issuedAt, expiresAt, secondsRemaining, and attendanceWindowClosesAt
Assert attendanceWindowClosesAt equals scheduledStart + 10 minutes per BR-01 window end
POST /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/close
GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/qr/current and assert no valid token or 403/422 session-not-active response
cases.expected: QR current endpoint contract per API design §6.1 exposes attendanceWindowClosesAt during Active; token unavailable after close

cases.title: Student check-in page shows session-ended message after instructor closes session
preconditions: Active session was open; instructor closed session via UI or API
Authenticated Student navigates to check-in deep link with stale QR token
steps: Student opens check-in page for closed session
Submit check-in or observe page state after load
Verify Vietnamese error message indicates session not active or has ended
Verify no success confirmation and attendance remains Absent
cases.expected: UI surfaces SessionNotActive outcome per AC-05d after close; student cannot obtain Present via late check-in

cases.title: Instructor locates Draft, Active, and Closed sessions via /sessions search, status chips, sort, and pagination
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor is logged in to instructor SPA
At least 21 sessions exist across Draft, Active, and Closed/Cancelled statuses for assigned classes
Sessions span multiple class codes (e.g. HESD-01) and subject names for search filtering
steps: Navigate to /sessions
Verify grouped SessionCard layout with status filter chips Tất cả, Đang diễn ra, Nháp, Đã kết thúc and search input with placeholder Tìm theo lớp, môn…
Click Đang diễn ra chip and verify only Active sessions shown with Đang diễn ra status badges
Click a visible Active SessionCard and verify detail or monitor links are available for live session management
Click Nháp chip and verify only Draft sessions shown; open one Draft session detail and confirm Mở buổi học action is available
Click Đã kết thúc chip and verify Closed and Cancelled sessions grouped with Đã kết thúc badges
Type HESD in search field and wait 300 ms debounce; verify results filter by classCode, className, subjectCode, or subjectName
Clear search via × control and click Tất cả chip; verify grouping order Đang diễn ra → Nháp → Đã kết thúc with scheduledStartTime desc within each group per 14-listing §4.3 and §5.2
Navigate to page 2 via Pagination footer (offset 20) or load-more and verify next batch of SessionCards loads without duplicate ids
cases.expected: Session list supports lifecycle discovery per AC-05: instructor can filter by Active/Draft/Closed status, search class-subject, sort by scheduledStartTime desc within group, and paginate at offset 20 on /sessions hub

cases.title: GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/attendance returns 200 with summary counts during Active session
preconditions: Instructor session cookie is set
Active sessionId with N enrolled, P Present, and K Pending attendance records
steps: GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/attendance with Instructor session
Assert HTTP status 200
Assert response body summary contains enrolled, present, pending, absent, excused, rejected counts
Assert summary.enrolled equals N and summary.present equals P and summary.pending equals K
Assert records array contains per-student status and checkedInAt when Present
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with attendance roster DTO per API design §7.1; instructor can monitor check-in progress per AC-05

cases.title: Present and Excused attendance records unchanged when session closes
preconditions: Active session with P Present, E Excused, and K Pending attendance records in PostgreSQL
SessionService.close wired to AttendanceService.finalizeOnClose
steps: Record Present and Excused record IDs and statuses before close
Invoke SessionService.close(sessionId) under owning Instructor context
Query attendance_records for previously Present and Excused IDs
Assert all P Present rows remain Present with checkedInAt unchanged
Assert all E Excused rows remain Excused
cases.expected: On close, only Pending records become Absent per AC-05c; Present and Excused statuses preserved

cases.title: Flow A step 6: Instructor closes Active session after check-in window
preconditions: Flow A steps 1–5 completed: roster seeded, session opened, students checked in, monitor verified
Active session with mix of Present and Pending attendance records
Authenticated Instructor with assignment to session
steps: POST /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/close with Instructor session
Assert HTTP status 200 and response status Closed with closedAt set
GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/attendance and assert summary.pending is 0
Verify all previously Pending records are Absent and Present records unchanged
cases.expected: Session closed as Flow A step 6 per testing-plan §6 Flow A; roster finalized per AC-05; prerequisite for admin CSV export in Flow A step 7
